name: customer-lifetime-value-skill
description: Calculate, predict, and segment customers by Lifetime Value (CLV) using RFM analysis (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) and probabilistic models. Supports cohort analysis and retention scoring.
author: alphaparkinc

orders.description: List of order objects with customer_id, amount, and date fields.

prediction_months.description: Future months to predict CLV for.

segment_count.description: Number of value segments to group customers into.

customers.description: Enriched customer records with CLV, RFM scores, and segment labels.

segments.description: Segment definitions with customer counts and avg CLV.
